title: Authors and Citation
text: Wright D (2022). gwaspr: GWAS plots R. R package version 1.0, https://derekmichaelwright.github.io/gwaspr.
code: @Manual{,   title = {gwaspr: GWAS plots with R},   author = {Derek Wright},   year = {2022},   note = {R package version 1.0},   url = {https://derekmichaelwright.github.io/gwaspr}, }

title: GWAS plots with R
text: gwaspr: R package plotting GWAS results GAPIT package

title: GWAS plots with R
text: best practice, output GAPIT folder. case, located folder called GWAS_Results/. example plot GWAS results 3 traits lentil diversity panel: Testa_Pattern: qualitative trait describing presence absence seed coat pigmentation. DTF_Nepal_2017: quantitative trait describing days sowing flowering 2017 Nepal field trial. DTF_Sask_2017: quantitative trait describing days sowing flowering 2017 Saskatchewan field trial. DTF_Sask_2017_b: run b coefficient photothermal model (see Wright et al. 2020) used covariate. Note: info check GWAS tutorial.
code: myTraits <- list_Traits(folder = "GWAS_Results/") myTraits ## [1] "DTF_Nepal_2017"  "DTF_Sask_2017"   "DTF_Sask_2017_b" "Testa_Pattern" myFiles <- list_Result_Files(folder = "GWAS_Results/") myFiles ##  [1] "GAPIT.Blink.DTF_Nepal_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"    ##  [2] "GAPIT.Blink.DTF_Sask_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"     ##  [3] "GAPIT.Blink.DTF_Sask_2017_b.GWAS.Results.csv"   ##  [4] "GAPIT.Blink.Testa_Pattern.GWAS.Results.csv"     ##  [5] "GAPIT.FarmCPU.DTF_Nepal_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"  ##  [6] "GAPIT.FarmCPU.DTF_Sask_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"   ##  [7] "GAPIT.FarmCPU.DTF_Sask_2017_b.GWAS.Results.csv" ##  [8] "GAPIT.FarmCPU.Testa_Pattern.GWAS.Results.csv"   ##  [9] "GAPIT.GLM.DTF_Nepal_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"      ## [10] "GAPIT.GLM.DTF_Sask_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"       ## [11] "GAPIT.GLM.DTF_Sask_2017_b.GWAS.Results.csv"     ## [12] "GAPIT.GLM.Testa_Pattern.GWAS.Results.csv"       ## [13] "GAPIT.MLM.DTF_Nepal_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"      ## [14] "GAPIT.MLM.DTF_Sask_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"       ## [15] "GAPIT.MLM.DTF_Sask_2017_b.GWAS.Results.csv"     ## [16] "GAPIT.MLM.Testa_Pattern.GWAS.Results.csv"       ## [17] "GAPIT.MLMM.DTF_Nepal_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"     ## [18] "GAPIT.MLMM.DTF_Sask_2017.GWAS.Results.csv"      ## [19] "GAPIT.MLMM.DTF_Sask_2017_b.GWAS.Results.csv"    ## [20] "GAPIT.MLMM.Testa_Pattern.GWAS.Results.csv" myResults <- table_GWAS_Results(folder = "GWAS_Results/", files = myFiles,                    threshold = 6.7, sug.threshold = 6) list_Top_Markers(trait = "DTF_Nepal_2017", model = "MLMM",                   folder = "GWAS_Results/",                   threshold = 6.7, chroms = c(2,5), n = 1) ##                      SNP CHR      POS -log10(p) ## 1 Lcu.2RBY.Chr2p42543877   2 42543877     11.58 ## 2  Lcu.2RBY.Chr5p1069654   5  1069654     16.71

title: GWAS plots with R
code: mp <- gg_GWAS_Summary(folder = "GWAS_Results/",                        traits = myTraits,                       models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "Blink"),                       colors = c("darkgreen", "darkred", "darkorange3", "steelblue"),                       threshold = 6.7, sug.threshold = 6,                        hlines = c(1.5,3.5),                       vlines = c("Lcu.2RBY.Chr2p42543877","Lcu.2RBY.Chr5p1069654",                                  "Lcu.2RBY.Chr6p2528817", "Lcu.2RBY.Chr6p12212845"),                       vline.colors = c("red", "red", "green", "blue"),                       title = "Summary of Significant GWAS Results") ggsave("man/figures/GWAS_Summary.png", mp, width = 10, height = 3) gg_GWAS_plotly(mp, filename = "GWAS_Summary.html")

title: GWAS plots with R
code: for(i in myTraits) {   mp <- gg_Manhattan(folder = "GWAS_Results/", trait = i, facet = F,                      models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "Blink"),                      threshold = 7.3, sug.threshold = 6.7, pmax = 12,                      vlines = c("Lcu.2RBY.Chr2p42543877",                                  "Lcu.2RBY.Chr5p1069654",                                 "Lcu.2RBY.Chr6p12212845",                                 "Lcu.2RBY.Chr6p2528817") )   ggsave(paste0("man/figures/Multi_",i,".png"), mp, width = 10, height = 4) }

title: GWAS plots with R
code: for(i in myTraits) {   mp <- gg_Manhattan(folder = "GWAS_Results/", trait = i, facet = T,                      threshold = 7.3, sug.threshold = 6.7,                      vlines = c("Lcu.2RBY.Chr2p42543877",                                  "Lcu.2RBY.Chr5p1069654",                                 "Lcu.2RBY.Chr6p12212845",                                 "Lcu.2RBY.Chr6p2528817"))   ggsave(paste0("man/figures/Facet_",i,".png"), mp, width = 10, height = 8) }

title: GWAS plots with R
text: GAPIT: R package performing Genome Wide Association Studies (GWAS) https://github.com/jiabowang/GAPIT3

title: GWAS plots with R
text: tidyverse, ggpubr, ggbeeswarm, ggrepel, ggtext, plotly, htmlwidgets © Derek Michael Wright www.dblogr.com/

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: Creates summary GWAS plot significant associations.

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
code: gg_GWAS_Summary(   folder = NULL,   traits = list_Traits(),   threshold = -log10(5e-08),   sug.threshold = -log10(5e-06),   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "Blink", "GLM"),   colors = c("darkgreen", "darkred", "darkorange3", "steelblue", "darkgoldenrod2"),   shapes = 21:25,   hlines = NULL,   vlines = NULL,   vline.colors = rep("black", 10),   vline.legend = T,   title = NULL,   caption = paste0("Sig Threshold = ", threshold, " = Large\nSuggestive = ",     sug.threshold, " = Small"),   rowread = 2000 )

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. traits traits read. threshold Significant threshold. sug.threshold Suggestive threshold. models Models read. colors Colors model. hlines Locations horizontal lines. e.g., hlines = c(1.5,2.5). vlines Markers labelled vertical red line. vline.colors colors vertical line. vline.legend Logical, display vline color legend. title title plot. caption caption plot. rowread Number rows read GWAS results file.

title: gg_GWAS_plotly — gg_GWAS_plotly
text: mp ggplot object. filename Filename plot.

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
code: gg_Manhattan(   folder,   trait,   title = trait,   threshold = NULL,   sug.threshold = NULL,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   vlines = markers,   vline.color = "red",   facet = T,   qq = T,   pmax = NULL,   models = c("MLM", "MLMM", "FarmCPU", "Blink", "GLM"),   colors1 = c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3",     "darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen"),   colors2 = c("darkgreen", "darkred", "darkorange3", "steelblue", "darkorchid4",     "darkgoldenrod2") )

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. vlines Markers used location vertical lines. vline.color color vertical line. facet Logical, whether produce facetted multi-model plot. qq Logical, whether add QQ plot pmax max value y-axis. models Models read. colors1 Colors chromosome. colors2 Colors model.

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
text: Creates manhattan plot zoomed particular region.

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
code: gg_Manhattan_Zoom(   folder,   trait,   chr,   start,   end,   title = trait,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   vlines = markers,   vline.color = "red",   models = c("GLM", "MLM", "CMLM", "MLMM", "SUPER", "FarmCPU", "Blink"),   colors = c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen",     "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen") )

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. chr Chromosome plot. start Start position chromosome. end End position chromosome. title title plot. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. vlines Markers used location vertical lines. vline.color color vertical line. models Models read. colors Colors chromosome

title: gg_Marker — gg_Marker
text: Creates marker plot myG myY objects.

title: gg_Marker — gg_Marker
code: gg_Marker(   myG,   myY,   trait,   marker,   marker2 = NULL,   type = "bar",   points = T,   colors = c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkred", "steelblue4", "darkslategray",     "maroon4", "purple4", "darkblue") )

title: gg_Marker — gg_Marker
text: myG GWAS genotype object. Note: myY GWAS phenotype object. trait Trait plot. marker Marker plot. marker2 Second marker plot. type Type plot make. points Logical, whether plot points colors Color palette.

title: gg_Volcano — gg_Volcano
code: gg_Volcano(   folder,   trait,   title = trait,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   models = c("GLM", "MLM", "MLMM", "CMLM", "SUPER", "FarmCPU", "Blink") )

title: gg_Volcano — gg_Volcano
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. models Models read.

title: list_Threshold. — list_Threshold
text: num_markers Number markers p desired p value

title: list_Top_Markers — list_Top_Markers
code: list_Top_Markers(   trait,   model,   folder = NULL,   threshold = NULL,   chroms = 1:50,   n = 1 )

title: list_Top_Markers — list_Top_Markers
text: trait GWAS trait. threshold filters results -log10(p) threshold. chroms Chromosomes include. n Number per chromosome. method GWAS method.

title: table_GWAS_Results — table_GWAS_Results
code: table_GWAS_Results(   folder,   files,   threshold = 6,   sug.threshold = NULL,   rowread = 2000 )

title: table_GWAS_Results — table_GWAS_Results
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. files files read. threshold Significant threshold. sug.threshold Suggestive threshold. rowread Number rows read.

title: theme_gwaspr. — theme_gwaspr
code: theme_gwaspr(   x,   bgFill = "grey95",   lineColor = "white",   linesize = 0.75,   stripFill = "white",   ... )

title: theme_gwaspr. — theme_gwaspr
text: x ggplot bgFill background fill color lineColor color axis lines linesize border line size stripFill strip background color
